ddls:
CREATE TABLE "listings" (
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each listing */,
  "posted_on" TEXT /* Date when the listing was posted */,
  "bhk" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms in the property */,
  "rent" REAL /* Monthly rent for the property */,
  "size" REAL /* Size of the property in square feet */,
  "floor" TEXT /* Floor information (e.g., '1 out of 3') */,
  "area_type" TEXT /* Type of area (e.g., Super Area, Carpet Area) */,
  "area_locality" TEXT /* Local area where the property is located */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the property is listed */,
  "furnishing_status" TEXT /* Furnishing status of the property (e.g., Unfurnished, Semi-Furnished) */,
  "tenant_preferred" TEXT /* Preferred tenant type (e.g., Bachelors, Family) */,
  "bathroom" INTEGER /* Number of bathrooms in the property */,
  "point_of_contact" TEXT /* Contact point for the listing */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property (e.g., Apartment, House, Studio) */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* Amenities available in the property */,
  "availability_status" TEXT /* Availability status of the property (e.g., Available, Booked, Under Negotiation) */,
  "posted_by" TEXT /* Posted by owner or agent */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the listing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("listing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property detail entry */,
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the listing this property detail is associated with */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the property features and amenities */,
  "images" TEXT /* Image URLs or paths for the property listings */,
  "amenity_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of amenities */,
  "video_tour_url" TEXT /* URL for a virtual tour video of the property */,
  "nearby_landmarks" TEXT /* Information about nearby landmarks or points of interest */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Last modification date of the property details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_listing_id FOREIGN KEY ("listing_id") REFERENCES listings ("listing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tenants" (
  "tenant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tenant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the tenant */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the tenant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the tenant */,
  "preferred_area" TEXT /* Preferred area for renting a property */,
  "tenant_type" TEXT /* Type of tenant (e.g., Bachelors, Family) */,
  "budget" REAL /* Maximum budget for rent */,
  "preferred_bhk" INTEGER /* Preferred number of bedrooms */,
  "preferred_bathrooms" INTEGER /* Preferred number of bathrooms */,
  "move_in_date" TEXT /* Preferred move-in date */,
  "additional_requirements" TEXT /* Any additional requirements or preferences */,
  "last_search_date" TEXT /* Last date the tenant searched for properties */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tenant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bookings" (
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each booking */,
  "tenant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tenant who made the booking */,
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the listing that was booked */,
  "booking_date" TEXT /* Date when the booking was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the booking (e.g., confirmed, canceled) */,
  "move_in_date" TEXT /* Date when the tenant plans to move in */,
  "move_out_date" TEXT /* Date when the tenant plans to move out */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status (e.g., Paid, Pending) */,
  "booking_source" TEXT /* Source of the booking (e.g., Website, Agent) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the booking */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("booking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_tenant_id FOREIGN KEY ("tenant_id") REFERENCES tenants ("tenant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_listing_id FOREIGN KEY ("listing_id") REFERENCES listings ("listing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the listing being reviewed */,
  "tenant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tenant who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the tenant (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the tenant regarding their experience */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was submitted */,
  "tenant_name" TEXT /* Name of the tenant who wrote the review */,
  "review_source" TEXT /* Source of the review (e.g., Website, App) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_listing_id FOREIGN KEY ("listing_id") REFERENCES listings ("listing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_tenant_id FOREIGN KEY ("tenant_id") REFERENCES tenants ("tenant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact entry */,
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the listing associated with this contact */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the person to contact regarding the listing */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the person */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the person */,
  "contact_type" TEXT /* Type of contact (e.g., Owner, Agent) */,
  "office_address" TEXT /* Office address of the contact */,
  "last_contacted" TEXT /* Last date the contact was contacted */,
  "preferred_contact_method" TEXT /* Preferred method of contact (e.g., Email, Phone) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contacts_listing_id FOREIGN KEY ("listing_id") REFERENCES listings ("listing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the listing being analyzed */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views the listing has received */,
  "inquiries" INTEGER /* Number of inquiries made regarding the listing */,
  "bookings" INTEGER /* Number of bookings made for the listing */,
  "clicks" INTEGER /* Number of clicks on the listing */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the listing */,
  "total_reviews" INTEGER /* Total number of reviews for the listing */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the analytics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_listing_id FOREIGN KEY ("listing_id") REFERENCES listings ("listing_id")
)
